title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on housing and urban planning.

questions.question: Do you think owning a home is still an achievable and desirable goal for young people today, or has that ideal changed?
How can urban planners design cities that are both environmentally sustainable and comfortable for residents to live in?

script.text: Do you think owning a home is still an achievable and desirable goal for young people today, or has that ideal changed?
How can urban planners design cities that are both environmentally sustainable and comfortable for residents to live in?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
